name: luly-v0-3-3
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.3.3 (patch тАФ logos & image sizes): (1) Real-logo bug fix тАФ the assembler's loadInlineSvg required SVG markup to start with `<svg`, so real downloaded brand logos that lead with an `<?xml?>` prolog / `<!DOCTYPE>` / comments (Wikipedia, CDNs) were silently dropped тАФ no header logo, no hub logo. It now slices from the first `<svg`, so real logos inline correctly. (2) Logo priority тАФ header prefers the icon-only mark (short), hub prefers the lockup-with-name (long); PNG/JPEG URLs accepted as fallback. (3) Logos are real-or-asked, never fabricated тАФ when no real logo/icon is found after the full research ladder, the pipeline asks the user (abstract stand-in vs neutral placeholder) instead of drawing a fake; dead `hub-logo.svg` generation removed. (4) Card covers are abstract тАФ no text, no wordmark, no literal product; calm brand-color shapes. (5) Image sizes aligned to the app: media placeholder is SQUARE 800├Ч800 (app media block defaults to 1:1), card cover is a wide ~10:3 banner (1600├Ч480) matching the app default card.png (503├Ч151, cover-cropped fixed-height), icon stays 1:1. v0.3.2 (patch): fix a v0.3.1 regression тАФ the post-assembly validator still REQUIRED `body.theme.layout`, but v0.3.1 made the assembler omit `layout` when a flow has no overrides (the common case), so every default flow failed validation with "body.theme.layout missing" and had to be hand-patched. The validator now treats `layout` as optional (validates its shape only when present), matching the assembler and the app renderer (which falls back to the 1480px desktop default when layout is absent). v0.3.1 (minor тАФ schema accuracy, mobile/desktop, color application): (1) Layout-token fix тАФ flow-level layout overrides use the renderer's suffixed keys `maxWidthDesktop` / `paddingDesktop` (+ `*Mobile`); the old bare `maxWidth` default was silently ignored and is dropped, so flows keep the app default desktop width (1480px) unless deliberately overridden. (2) Color application тАФ luly-style now documents where key tokens actually render (quiz answer cards: `onSurface` unselected, `primaryLight` selected, `successLight` correct, `failureLight` wrong; `secondary` dark callouts with `textOnPrimary` text) and adds mandatory contrast targets for those answer-card and dark-callout pairs. (3) Per-viewport awareness тАФ skills now reference the `*Mobile` style tokens and per-block margin model (`margin*` / `margin*Mobile`, defaults top 16 / bottom 0) as polishing levers for the future agentic-edit scope, explicitly NOT emitted during simple generation.
